rationale: Top-of-form corporation name. The form serves both domestic and foreign corporations from this single 'entity.name' widget — when foreign, this is the home-jurisdiction legal name (which is also what's on file with Maine SOS). Same shape as LLC_MLLC-17.

widget_id: ie Articles of Incorporation Articles of Amendment etc
label_verbatim: FIRST: Name of document requiring correction: (i.e. Articles of Incorporation, Articles of Amendment, etc.)
rationale: Title of the original document being corrected. Same key as LLC_MLLC-17. Field-id is the truncated tail of the parenthetical example text (auto-named by the PDF authoring tool).

widget_id: Date on which document was filed by Secretary of State
label_verbatim: SECOND: Date on which document was filed by Secretary of State:
rationale: Date the original document was filed with the Maine SOS. Same key as LLC_MLLC-17.

label_verbatim: FOURTH: The inaccuracy or defect to be corrected is described as follows:
rationale: Large multiline text widget describing the inaccuracy or defect. Same key as LLC_MLLC-17. (THIRD is a fixed statutory recital with no widget.)

label_verbatim: FIFTH: The portion of the said document to be corrected is corrected to read in its entirety as follows:
rationale: Large multiline text widget for the corrected text. Same key as LLC_MLLC-17.

label_verbatim: SEVENTH (Foreign Corporation Only): Jurisdiction of incorporation ___ and the date on which the corporation was authorized to transact business in Maine ___
rationale: Jurisdiction of incorporation for foreign corporations. Field-id is a fragment of the inline label text (auto-named — the underlined blank for jurisdiction sits between two label fragments). Same key as LP_MLPA-12A / LLP_MLLP-2.

label_verbatim: SEVENTH (Foreign Corporation Only): …and the date on which the corporation was authorized to transact business in Maine ___
rationale: Date the foreign corporation was originally authorized to transact business in Maine. Field-id is generic 'undefined_2' (template anomaly — the second blank in SEVENTH did not get a meaningful /T name). Same key as LP_MLPA-12A.

widget_id: type or print name and capacity
label_verbatim: *By ___ (signature of any duly authorized person) / (type or print name and capacity)
rationale: Combined printed-name + capacity widget. Shape D per filing-signer-shape convention. The (signature) line above is wet-ink only with no AcroForm widget. Per page-2 footnote and §121.5, the signer must be a duly authorized officer or the corporation's clerk — capacity should reflect that role.

label_verbatim: Name of entity(s) on the submitted filings [1]

widget_id: Name of entitys on the submitted filings 2
label_verbatim: Name of entity(s) on the submitted filings [2]
Hold attested copy for pick up

rationale: Total fees ($50 base per page-0 header plus expedite premium).

Email address to use for annual report reminders
label_verbatim: (Email address to use for annual report reminders)
